description_long: This is a compact, stylized military tank with a robust, angular body and a prominent, centrally mounted cannon. The turret is hexagonal and sits atop the main hull, featuring a hatch on top and angular armor panels on all sides. The tank is equipped with two wide, treaded tracks that provide stability and traction, with the tracks partially covered by armored side skirts. The front of the vehicle is dominated by the large gun barrel and reinforced frontal armor, while the rear is more streamlined and less detailed. The overall color scheme is a muted green with darker accents, giving it a utilitarian and tactical appearance. No visible markings, camouflage patterns, or additional weapon mounts are present.
description: A compact, stylized green military tank with a large central cannon, angular turret, and wide treaded tracks. The vehicle features robust armor and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large central cannon, reinforced frontal armor, and the wide tracks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the cannon, the hexagonal turret, and the armored side skirts covering the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the turret, the rear armor, and the full width of the tracks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the cannon and side armor from the other direction.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with angular, sloped panels covering the turret, front, sides, and tracks; appears thick and robust.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; solid muted green color with darker accents.
